svg.text: Admin Mockup 02 · Manajemen Siswa — v2 (parent visual language)
Anchored to ParentInboxScreen: brand hero · horizontal filter chips · section-grouped list · BillingRow-style cards
Hero (admin navy) · breadcrumb + big title + counter chip · horizontal filter chips · section-grouped cards
B · Filter bottom sheet — same BrandHeroSheet pattern as parent
Tinted icon header · section labels · chip grids · sticky footer
C · Tambah / Edit Siswa — same brand-bottom-sheet pattern as parent's bayar / language pickers
AppEditBottomSheet · BottomSheetFooter · same shape as parent forms

g.text: Hosts: gradient hero (with breadcrumb + big title +
counter chip + back/search) + horizontal filter chip
strip + section-grouped list + FAB. Generic over
role color (admin navy / teacher cobalt / parent azure).
filter pattern with parent's chip strip pattern
Visual parity rules (same across parent / admin / teacher)
• Hero: 28px rounded bottom · breadcrumb (11pt 500) · title (24pt 800) · counter chip
• Filter chips: 36px tall · 13px border-radius · count badge 14×16 right-aligned
• Card: 14px radius · 0.75 slate200 border · 44×44 avatar disc · "Detail →" link right
• Status pill: 14px tall · 7px radius · color-tinted bg + dot + label (Aktif / Belum / etc.)
• Card border on alert: 1.2px amber/red — same as parent overdue billing rows
• FAB: 56px circle in role color · drop-shadow · navy for admin, azure for parent
• Filter sheet: BrandHeroSheet · brand-azure tinted icon · footer with Reset + Terapkan(N)
Building BrandListScaffold replaces AdminCrudScaffold for 5 admin screens (Siswa/Guru/Kelas/Mapel/Jadwal). Big diff but unlocks parent ↔ admin visual parity for all CRUD lists.
